purpose: First Indonesian monolingual baseline after human review of EN-ID prompt translations. This command is Qwen/local-only and must not use the OpenAI smoke override.

preconditions.why: C1 ID prompts require human bilingual review before they are valid benchmark evidence.
Baseline episodes must call the local NegotiationArena checkout.
Baselines are benchmark evidence and must use local cached Qwen, local Qwen/vLLM, or a later explicitly wired Modal Qwen endpoint, not the OpenAI smoke override.
